zh.lifeSummary: Catharina Gebhard於1722年1月19日出生在德國賀瑟。她於1742年與Johann Casper Repp在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gebhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Hans, Arno, Dieter, Heinrich, Ilse, Kurt, Manfred.

variants.name: Gebhardt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Klaus, Arno, Bernd, Dieter, Elke, Ernst, Erwin, Georg, Gottlieb, Hildegarde.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements geb ‘gift’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. A Christian saint of this name was bishop of Constance around the end of the 10th century, and his popularity may have had an influence on the continued use of the personal name into the Middle Ages and beyond.

nameMeanings.name: Catharina
meanings: English: An English form of Catharine.

historicEvents.title: Germans defeat Napolean in Leipzig
historicEvents.description: On Oct 19, 1813, Germany defeats Napolean. The commanding officer for the Allied side was Prince Karl Phillipp Schwarzenberg.
The Congress of Vienna established the German Confederation of 39 independent German states.

en.lifeSummary: Catharina Gebhard was born on 19 January 1722, in Hesse, Germany. She married Johann Casper Repp in 1742, in Berks, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters.
